requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Atlantic Coastal Derating for Portugal PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及葡萄牙光伏逆变器大西洋沿岸降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及葡萄牙光伏逆變器大西洋沿岸降額

summary.en: For Portugal solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. IPQ is the national standards body (adopting EN standards as NP EN), ERSE oversees the energy sector, and E-Redes (distribution) and REN (transmission) control the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Portugal has Atlantic coastal exposure, so safety files should also address enclosure ingress protection, corrosion-resistant materials, terminal temperature rise, ventilation, and derating for high humidity and Atlantic marine exposure — particularly for south-facing rooftop systems in Alentejo/Algarve and offshore-adjacent utility projects in Sines or Setúbal Bay areas. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for EU/Portugal market access.
summary.zh: 对于葡萄牙太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。IPQ是国家标准机构（以NP EN标准形式采用EN标准），ERSE监管能源行业，E-Redes（配电）和REN（输电）控制实际并网接口，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。葡萄牙面临大西洋沿岸暴露，安全文件还应说明外壳防护等级、耐腐蚀材料、端子温升、通风以及针对高湿和大西洋海洋暴露的降额——特别是阿连特茹/阿尔加威朝南屋顶系统，以及锡尼什或塞图巴尔湾附近的沿海大型项目。依据LVD 2014/35/EU的CE标志为进入欧盟/葡萄牙市场的强制要求。
summary.zht: 對於葡萄牙太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。IPQ是國家標準機構（以NP EN標準形式採用EN標準），ERSE監管能源行業，E-Redes（配電）和REN（輸電）控制實際併網介面，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。葡萄牙面臨大西洋沿岸暴露，安全文件還應說明外殼防護等級、耐腐蝕材料、端子溫升、通風以及針對高濕和大西洋海洋暴露的降額——特別是阿連特茹/阿爾加威朝南屋頂系統，以及錫尼什或塞圖巴爾灣附近的沿海大型項目。依據LVD 2014/35/EU的CE標誌為進入歐盟/葡萄牙市場的強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU — CE marking mandatory for EU/Portugal market access
IPQ standards adoption as NP EN and conformity expectations where applicable
ERSE and E-Redes/REN project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for Atlantic coastal salt-mist, humidity, ingress protection, corrosion resistance, and thermal derating

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Portugal projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Portugal project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and Atlantic coastal environmental exposure. CE marking under LVD has no Chinese domestic equivalent.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为葡萄牙项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而葡萄牙项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件和大西洋沿岸环境暴露。LVD CE标志在中国国内无对等要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為葡萄牙項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而葡萄牙項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件和大西洋沿岸環境暴露。LVD CE標誌在中國國內無對等要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Portugal IEC/CE safety expectations. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Portugal 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for Atlantic salt-mist corrosion, ingress protection, humidity, ventilation, and thermal derating. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is a hard legal gate. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Portugal can require updated safety documentation. Portuguese-language installation manuals are commonly required by E-Redes and installers.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足葡萄牙IEC/CE安全要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配葡萄牙230/400 V 50 Hz配置，记录保护配合和接地，并补充大西洋盐雾腐蚀、外壳防护、湿度、通风和热降额环境证据。依据LVD 2014/35/EU的CE标志是硬性法律门槛。针对葡萄牙对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。E-Redes及安装商通常要求提供葡萄牙语安装手册。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足葡萄牙IEC/CE安全要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配葡萄牙230/400 V 50 Hz配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並補充大西洋鹽霧腐蝕、外殼防護、濕度、通風和熱降額環境證據。依據LVD 2014/35/EU的CE標誌是硬性法律門檻。針對葡萄牙對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。E-Redes及安裝商通常要求提供葡萄牙語安裝手冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is a legal prerequisite for EU/Portugal market access; IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence is additionally required in practice where E-Redes, REN, ERSE, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires it for grid-connected PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Portugal/EU

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Portugal PV projects. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Portugal's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and document Atlantic coastal salt-mist, humidity, ingress-protection, corrosion, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current E-Redes, REN, ERSE, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment. Portuguese-language documentation is commonly required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 葡萄牙光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。依据LVD 2014/35/EU的CE标志为强制要求。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配葡萄牙230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并记录大西洋沿岸盐雾、湿度、防护等级、腐蚀和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行E-Redes、REN、ERSE及项目业主安全要求。通常要求提供葡萄牙语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 葡萄牙光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。依據LVD 2014/35/EU的CE標誌為強制要求。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配葡萄牙230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並記錄大西洋沿岸鹽霧、濕度、防護等級、腐蝕和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行E-Redes、REN、ERSE及項目業主安全要求。通常要求提供葡萄牙語文件。
